title: Multi-file smoke
description: Internal: validates _index.json multi-file lesson loading via Python imports.
objectives: Confirm starter/_index.json is loaded by the frontend course loader
Confirm both files reach /workspace via writeFiles
Confirm Python `from helper import greet` resolves at runtime
recap: Internal-only smoke test that verifies the multi-file lesson chain (scaffolder → loader → backend writeFiles → runner Python imports). Not shown to learners.
